qb_required_note: QuickBooks Desktop (Pro/Premier/Enterprise) must be installed on this machine for QB Sync features. QB version 2019+ recommended.
toast_required_note: A valid Toast account with API access is required. At least one Toast login session must be established before downloads work.
google_required_note: Google Drive connection requires OAuth consent. Download credentials.json from the Google Cloud Console and place it in the app folder.
